commands.review_summary:
The PR moves shared terminal helpers into a new private `@openclaw/terminal-core` workspace package and rewires imports, build inputs, plugin aliases, package-boundary types, startup metadata hashing, and related tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR regression: comparing current main to PR head shows the CDP timer cap and regression test removed, and a Node 24 probe demonstrates oversized timers collapse to 1ms. The terminal-core package-boundary issue is source-reproducible from the alias map and package files list.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs maintainer/contributor handling because it has a protected maintainer label, dependency-guard context, missing real behavior proof, and a boundary decision alongside the concrete code repair.
